name: Ribblett School Bus Line
districts_or_customers: Johnstown, PA area school districts (specific district contracts unconfirmed; McIlwain holds Westmont Hilltop contract per district website)
recent_news: No recent M&A or news identified; appears to be a stable owner-operated school bus contractor in the Johnstown/Cambria County area since 1998.
fit_notes: Small family-owned PA contractor (~40 employees, est ~$0.6M-$1.4M revenue). In Summit's PA footprint and likely succession-ripe given single-owner profile; fleet size likely small (15-25 buses), so tuck-in scale is modest but geographically additive.

name: Mariner's Anchor Bus Svc
recent_news: No web presence located; address (677 Bo Bo Banks Rd) is a 4,782 sqft residential property on 9.61 acres in Grantville, GA, suggesting a very small owner-operator (possibly dba or hobby/sole-proprietor operation) rather than an established contractor.
fit_notes: Unverified as an operating school bus contractor; residential address and absence of any web/DOT footprint suggest this may not be a viable Summit tuck-in target. Recommend deprioritizing pending direct confirmation.

name: Chela School Bus Svc LLC
districts_or_customers: Likely Miami-Dade County Public Schools (private contractor pool for routes/field trips); also related entity 'Chela Nichols School Bus Service, INC' historically listed
recent_news: Florida LLC formed March 1, 2023 (doc # L23000108820); active status with last annual report March 4, 2025. Predecessor 'Chela Nichols School Bus Service, INC' also exists.
fit_notes: Very small, newly-formed Miami-Dade private bus contractor under sole-owner Graciela Nichols. Likely a private/charter route operator (Cuban-American family-owned segment typical for Miami market). Succession signal low given recent formation; could be a low-priority bolt-on for FL density.

name: Ileana School Bus
districts_or_customers: Likely Miami-Dade Public Schools approved private bus contractor pool
recent_news: No M&A or recent news located. Operating from Miami Gardens; appears in D&B directory with reported sales ~$0.09M (suggests very small / single-route operator).
fit_notes: Very small Miami-Dade private bus operator with minimal digital footprint; likely owner-operator. Limited tuck-in scale; could only be relevant as part of a roll-up of Miami's fragmented private bus operators.

name: J & M School Bus LLC
districts_or_customers: Likely Miami-Dade Public Schools approved private bus contractor pool (separate from J & M Vera School Bus Service Inc., a different Hialeah-based entity owned by Jose Vera/Jose Silva)
recent_news: No M&A or news located; distinct from the better-known J & M Vera School Bus Service Inc. (DOT 2066265, Hialeah).
fit_notes: Small Miami-Dade private bus contractor under Javier Machado; address is a strip-mall suite suggesting modest scale. Plausible candidate in any Miami-Dade fragmented-market roll-up; standalone tuck-in scale likely limited.
